prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别约5066→2783→2715→4119→1219名，整体呈大幅波动趋势；2025年位次从前一年的4119名大幅前移至1219名，竞争显著加剧，近两年波动幅度达2900名；该校在内蒙古理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年32人、2022年30人、2023年30人、2024年30人、2025年31人；2026年计划增至35人，较2025年扩招约12.9%，扩招幅度较大，一定程度上缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第13名（Top20），近年排名稳定在第11–13名区间，为国内顶尖综合性大学；2026年声誉评价偏负面（涉及学术不端事件11起），但2025年声誉偏正面；抖音热度排名第29位（较热），综合热度约142万；历史投档异常方面，2022年多省断档（中关注），2023年低关注，2024–2025年中关注，整体舆情中性偏谨慎；拥有23个A-及以上学科，其中生态学、工商管理为A+，数学、物理学、生物学、临床医学（A-）、计算机科学与技术（A-）等均为强势学科，学科实力雄厚，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业2026年持续高热推荐，临床医学推荐，与中山大学优势学科高度匹配；内蒙古2026年物理类考生估算约11.1万人，较2025年增长约32.3%，考生规模大幅增加，整体竞争加剧；中山大学位于广东省广州市，属华南地区顶尖高校，对内蒙古考生而言属于跨省报考；该校在内蒙古招生规模较小（30余人），本地无特殊地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移的强势走势、2026年扩招12.9%的缓解效应、内蒙古物理类考生增长32.3%的竞争加剧、以及声誉偏负面的轻微抵消，预计2026年最低位次在2025年1219名基础上略有后移，预测最低位次约1283名，区间1137–1429名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1137–1429名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如1100名以内）可重点冲击临床医学（八年制）和计算机类等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（1400名左右）应以三档专业为主确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 5066 → 2783 → 2715 → 4119 → 1219, showing significant fluctuations overall; in 2025, the ranking moved sharply forward from 4119 in the previous year to 1219, indicating intensified competition, with a fluctuation range of about 2900 places in the last two years; the university's enrollment plan in Inner Mongolia for science (physics category): 32 in 2021, 30 in 2022, 30 in 2023, 30 in 2024, 31 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 35, an expansion of about 12.9% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large increase, alleviating competition pressure to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 13th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Top 20), with stable rankings in the 11th–13th range in recent years, making it a top comprehensive university in China; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (involving 11 academic misconduct incidents), but the 2025 reputation is somewhat positive; Douyin popularity ranking 29th (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 1.42 million; historical admission anomalies: multiple provinces experienced gaps in 2022 (medium concern), low concern in 2023, medium concern in 2024–2025, overall public opinion neutral to cautious; has 23 A- or above disciplines, including Ecology and Business Administration as A+, with strong disciplines such as Mathematics, Physics, Biology, Clinical Medicine (A-), and Computer Science and Technology (A-), demonstrating strong academic strength and strong appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended in 2026, Clinical Medicine is recommended, highly matching Sun Yat-sen University's advantageous disciplines; the estimated number of physics category examinees in Inner Mongolia in 2026 is about 111,000, an increase of about 32.3% compared to 2025, significantly increasing the examinee pool and overall competition; Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, a top university in South China, representing a cross-province application for Inner Mongolia examinees; the university's enrollment scale in Inner Mongolia is small (over 30 people), with no special local regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of the ranking moving sharply forward in 2025, the mitigating effect of a 12.9% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition due to a 32.3% increase in physics category examinees in Inner Mongolia, and the slight offset from a somewhat negative reputation, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to shift slightly backward from the 2025 ranking of 1219, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 1283, in the range of 1137–1429.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Computer Science (Guangzhou)
- Clinical Medicine (Shenzhen).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Electronic Information Engineering (Shenzhen)
- Physics (Shenzhen)

Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)

- Cyberspace Security (Shenzhen).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1137–1429, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1100), you can focus on aiming for top majors such as Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program) and Computer Science; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 1400), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 13th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, a top domestic comprehensive university with outstanding liberal arts strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (academic misconduct incidents), but 2025 was slightly positive; Douyin popularity ranking 29th (relatively hot); historical admission anomalies: multiple provinces experienced gaps in 2022 (medium attention), with sustained low to medium attention from 2023 to 2025, overall neutral public opinion; Sun Yat-sen University's liberal arts advantageous disciplines are prominent: Business Administration A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Philosophy A-, Sociology A-, Law A-, Applied Economics A-, Foreign Language and Literature A-, etc., strongly attracting high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is divided with wait-and-see attitude, Chinese Language/Literature recommended, Business Administration/Business clearly discouraged, highly correlated with Sun Yat-sen University's liberal arts enrollment majors; Inner Mongolia's 2026 history category candidates estimated at about 43,000, an increase of approximately 32.6% from 2025, a significant increase in candidate scale, overall intensifying competition; Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, a top university in South China; the university's liberal arts enrollment scale in Inner Mongolia is very small (7–8 people), with no special regional preference for cross-province applications.

预测结论.text: Considering the rebound trend of the 2025 ranking significantly moving forward, the 12.5% enrollment reduction in 2026 intensifying competition, the 32.6% increase in Inner Mongolia history category candidates adding competitive pressure, and the slight offset from the slightly negative reputation, the 2026 minimum ranking is expected to slightly move back from the 2025 ranking of 200, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 195, and a range of 145–245.
